message:
🐛 Fix 4 failing test suites after formatBytes + rewards refactors (#10089)

Update test expectations to match recent changes:
- formatBytes now drops trailing .0 for whole numbers (PR #10084)
- useGitHubRewards uses useAuth instead of localStorage tokens (PR #10081)
- useFeatureRequests mock preserves original module exports
- registry renderer bytes assertion updated

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
